item.title: Favorites collection, I like these two
item.description:
Out of nowhere
Pink shirt is fighting for his life
GOAT
I just love this game
You made it to the end credits. See you in 3 months

item.title: Rain Increases Endorphin Levels in Ducks, Making Them Enjoy It
item.dc:creator: Toxygition

item.title: I have a bit of the Avatar stuff saved up. Today is a good day for it.
item.description:
Ah ha! My cake day has caught *me* by surprise! Fortunately i had this available for upload. I was at exactly enough images and then I say one was a 40k image. Oh well. 49 ain't bad!
I like the Avatar series. I rewatched both recently and enjoy them immensely. It's ok to like things just because you like them. Tou don't have to explain or justify it. Be a need, read tour books, paint just for the sake of painting. Your hobbies and little joys don't need anyone's approval. Anyway. Kchow!
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: A man lost his dog "Lucy" and vows to never get another dog unless he finds one (sound on)
item.description: The song is "How to Save a Life" by The Fray This one hit deep hope you are having a great Friday
item.dc:creator: SnoopDoggyDawg

item.title: Cannot Leave Wisconsin without a visit to the Strategic Reserve ...
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Pound for pound the desert cat is an absolute killing machine
item.description: Edit: Thank you for the Pizza! Its way of moving is distinct: with its belly close to the ground, it moves at a fast run punctuated with occasional leaps. It is capable of sudden bursts of speed and can sprint at speeds of 30–40 km (19–25 mi) per hour. Four radio-collared sand cats in Israel moved long distances of 5–10 km (3.1–6.2 mi) in a single night. They were generally active throughout the night, hunting and travelling an average distance of 5.4 km (3.4 mi). They retired below ground at dawn and stayed in the burrow during the day. During the survey period, they used several burrows in their home ranges. Sauce: Wiki
item.dc:creator: wheyandcoffee

item.title: Brilliant! Perpetual hugs from your parents!
item.description: I am going to do something like this with my son for my mom while she is still with us. Dad would've gone nuts for this!

item.dc:creator: ScottishSelkie

item.title: Kanu signs a 1 day contract with the Windsor Spitfires!
item.description: 4 decades after he was to try out for the OHL team, but was derailed by an injury, he signs a 1 day contract. He used the time to sign autographs on various items to be auctioned off to raise funds for the Canadian Mental Health Association.
item.dc:creator: blackmomba

item.title: For the Weirdos shiting on Gus Walz. There's no longer going high when you go low. The game's Over for you!
item.description: USA: How to register to vote: https://www.usa.gov/register-to-vote USA: Check to see if you are registered to vote: https://vote.gov/ Voter Registration deadlines are here: https://www.vote.org/voter-registration-deadlines/ Ohio Voters: Check Your Registration: https://voterlookup.ohiosos.gov/voterlookup.aspx Vote BLUE the whole ballot through. #politics #democrats  #kamalaharris #harriswalz2024 #harriswalzusa2024  #timwalz #america #usa #patriot #harriswalz #democracy #freedom #lgbtqrights #womensrights #guncontrol #scotusreform #healthcarerights #wewin
item.dc:creator: KamalaHarris2024

item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: It's time for Funny Friday! A humor dump to end the week
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another Funny Friday, where we try to end the work week on a high note. As always, there's a link to some raunchier comedic bonus content in the comment, so make sure not to miss it. Hope you have a good time and at least a few chuckles along the way.
15 castings of magic missile using no mana whatsoever.
Dick move Sam. God tier trolling, but dick move.
Tony Hawk the skater? I wonder what he's up to these days...
How do they do it?!
... yes. Yes they are.
Bro tried walking up playing The Rains of Castamere and everything but failed.
Scottish twitter strikes again.
You had a bad day. You're taking one down. You sing a sad song just to turn it around...
The math isn't mathing!
Talk about a photobomb...
Hope this gave you a few laughs, and you have a great weekend. Don't forget the bonus content in the comments.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer
